mapper.select: SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name FROM sys_attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON a.student_id = s.id WHERE a.course_id = #{courseId} AND a.date = #{date}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_attendance (course_id, student_id, student_name, date, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{record.courseId}, #{record.studentId}, #{record.studentName}, #{record.date}, #{record.status}, #{record.remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_attendance WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND date = #{date}
